textByHash.ececfb373e37220a2493dd41f59d29b8f5f4017b: So, here to ask me what trouble I've gotten Fox into, are you?
textByHash.1ce9bfb529538655591ca9d3f7b916b832f74010: I've honed my instincts over the years.
textByHash.79c29d82553abcd90e07436a63109abe9260531e: Well, that and the fact you had that whole conversation within earshot.
textByHash.32e73fd01940c533b47480832c41e340e8f9fc12: Sort of. He's on some very unofficial business for me.
textByHash.ab2bc91f6d9f877ed620376d08490d2e8e5f69f3: If I told you... I'd have to kill you!
textByHash.9169f854f115ec5b98daa1f1d4e219f11c0866e1: Your face! Don't worry, I'm just pulling your leg.
textByHash.35e13a90ec5beceb39ad72d202c92678f22cbab7: I asked him to look into making some repairs to Kiko's bed. It's been getting tatty lately. I'm guessing he didn't end up having the materials needed. That'll be why he headed out.
textByHash.c5deabb59f2ba0706423ef42adb3b24091bc51e0: You're welcome to try, but you'll need to convince Kiko to let you. He's just by the table there.
textByHash.e25874222c060a0f7a03d6a037f2c3b3b24cff69: He's very easy to distract. We have a little fake mouse we use sometimes.
textByHash.645dd7679b3c9aa9152935634bc68c94b3675053: Have you checked Kiko's bed yet? It's just to the side of this table.
textByHash.57a137d06b37e6545b6e01a7e16a884aecf66a40: I already gave it to you. If you've lost it, you'll need to get another for yourself. I'd do so quickly if I were you. Kiko won't be happy if he finds out it's gone.
textByHash.0c5a41c64e09680d7c971c72e7da39e488cbbc0b: Only the best for our Kiko.
textByHash.01a3bc19c4319efebf2595b75a0858fc1a87aacb: We have a contact who lives in Outer Fortis. She stocks the best of the best when it comes to fabrics. That'll be where he went, but knowing Fox, he won't have gone directly there.
textByHash.8f235a46c5fd50e1def3f611f0983d2e579f1aad: He'll have stopped off for a bit of hunting first. There are some pyre foxes about halfway between here and the Locus Oasis that he was eyeing up. I bet that's where you'll find him.
textByHash.4d8e31542757c68b0baef2f65944f948a1a4f07b: That's right. They're about halfway between here and the Locus Oasis.
textByHash.d785851448fa9e14ff2d36ec469a4da872509d3c: Oh no... I should've offered to go with him. It's never sensible to be out after dark alone...
textByHash.830acd5ae6c46882eaf9efe6b16e36f176e02e24: Well thanks for checking in at least. He's still breathing and that's all Fox needs to come out on top.
textByHash.0b19159d0f86abd495c29cdeaca6d7550e67bf30: Ha! Now that's the Fox I know. I'll have to give him some odd jobs once he's back to make up for ones you're covering!
textByHash.4a6670133e8440621556fceeaa848b47a9db8484: Thank you, hunter. I'm not sure I could have forgiven myself if something terrible had happened to him.
textByHash.97eeb81cb70d05ea2291236fabdfbe5c03c9f00e: My apologies, but I don't have time to chat right now.
textByHash.a0a599d73671213c5b88231a00d93c8250078cd9: I'm so glad you managed to find and help him. I've read his report and you feature quite heavily.
textByHash.37e40ccc6780ff2cec7816d69d5870e513af3e71: Oi - don't sell yourself short. More importantly, don't give Fox too much credit.
textByHash.4a9509d43a025a0138b9d6d12bafcbb9edc46850: Could you check out the validity of this report for me? Someone thinks they've seen a . Once you find it, bring back one of its .
textByHash.a14316a95e6fefbb1d6775836e1298d233bd86e5: There's been rumours of a rare coming in. Once you find it, bring back one of its .
textByHash.3b12c69d000666f02c81746cd6629255c6b67798: We've got reports of a slightly different in the local population. Once you find it, bring back one of its .
textByHash.1dfec304917692fc7864b1252d0cee424089ddbe: Looks like we need some information on a unique specimen amongst the local population. Once you find it, bring back some of its .
textByHash.8dd6375b3b32be72dd7a5c34d66b5ffd3642bbe9: I've heard rumours of a strange that you could check out for me. Once you find it, bring back one of its .
textByHash.3922a6a2b5c9593d8d2b5867b3665b919a8c2c66: Fancy a challenge? Why not hunt some of the moonlight antelope deeper in the cavern and bring back one of their hooves.
textByHash.970c440ac90a867b2aa77cca3d528b351d860286: You're quite the talented hunter! I'll have to keep you around. Here's your reward.
textByHash.72ae47d9523edd12489d70789339e1fb699760e7: Want to test your skills again?
textByHash.6c2de7e9597fc9dcf826c71e669f9746a4632d1a: Thanks for that. I'll mark off that report for you. Would you like another rumour?
textByHash.ee80a5c96402ad065576f5e8d9ce32fb2f6a66ef: You're hunting for me at the moment. This rumour was about a . You'll need to bring back some of its .
textByHash.0d1cd9824a1b34d8d03b786adbf64fa9b91f1839: I hear you're hunting for . Aren't you looking for a at the moment? You'll need to bring back some of its .
textByHash.1adff6c74c60af6d4b216e5b0437fec4fc1f702a: Unless you fancy hunting for me instead?
textByHash.cef2ad7e605f6f365bb3551804d50463799ea4b1: If I'm remembering correctly, I asked you to hunt a and bring back some of its .
textByHash.81fc9cf16c5af2941312da6450274f9f5d53f5b5: Heard we're having an intel reshuffle. You should probably focus on your current task for now.
textByHash.6e1f4ef9f53f9213fe3ab194d54dddc4b4bcbeae: Gilman said that you're doing some work for him right now. I won't interfere with that.
textByHash.3ca6dc3b19cd81abf93d51d55b582ff7300435f9: We're all having a rest, but don't you have something to be getting on with?
textByHash.5459974270cd91af1a3aad45817a5e25ebed5d96: There's an extra seat at this table. I suppose you'd be interested in claiming it one day?
